items.title: Braiins Hashrate Autopilot
items.description: Official automation tool from Braiins for managing hashrate bids on the Braiins Hashpower marketplace. Rules-based engine that buys hashrate when price crosses thresholds and auto-rebalances between pools.

items.title: Mining with Rented Hashrate: Braiins Hashpower + DATUM
items.description: Pared-down outline for ~45 min: 20 min content + 25 min demos & Q&A.
